name: deleteTableRows
description: Deletes one or more rows from an existing Google Docs table without replacing the whole document.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

tableId.description: The MCP table ID returned by listDocumentTables, for example "table:body:0".

rowStart.description: Zero-based starting row index to delete.

tabId.description: The ID of the specific tab containing the table. If not specified, uses the first tab or legacy document body.
